sections.title: Before attempting to run past a sword trap

lines.speaker: r2t2pnsh0Ty
lines.text: How am I supposed to get past this?

sections.title: When getting hit by a sword
After making it past the sword trap

lines.speaker: r2t2pnsh0Ty
lines.text: If I'd been any slower, I would've lost my head!

lines.speaker: r2t2pnsh0Ty
lines.text: Buying that ring was definitely a wise investment.

lines.speaker: r2t2pnsh0Ty
lines.text: Well, the door to the next floor has already closed. Might as well take a break.

lines.speaker: r2t2pnsh0Ty
lines.text: 96... 97... 98... 99 Hallowed marks! Almost enough for that grapple!

lines.speaker: r2t2pnsh0Ty
lines.text: I can't wait until I have enough Hallowed marks to obtain a dark graceful outfit.

lines.speaker: r2t2pnsh0Ty
lines.text: I prefer this floor. Those owls on the next one creep me out!
